extracted_information: The web content provides a detailed feature comparison across 'Free', 'Core', and 'Enterprise' plans for Ona (formerly Gitpod). It describes Ona Compute Units (OCUs) as the credit system for environment runtime but does not specify monetary pricing or the exact OCU allocation per plan. Detailed technical specifications for VMs or GPUs are not provided.

development_environment_capabilities.high_powered_vms_gpus: Available for Enterprise plan (specific technical details like RAM, CPU, GPU models are not provided).
development_environment_capabilities.llm_support: Private LLM access (BYO LLM) for Enterprise plan.
development_environment_capabilities.ai_infrastructure_integration: AWS Bedrock, Google Vertex, Anthropic, Custom LLM Gateways for Enterprise plan.
development_environment_capabilities.network_control: Complete network control (incl. load balancers) for Enterprise plan.

compute_units.description: Credits used for environment runtime and agent conversations.
compute_units.included_ocu_range: 80 - 2,200 OCUs (monthly recurring). Specific per-plan allocation is not detailed.

pricing.monetary_pricing: Not available in the provided content.

items.Enterprise: AWS Bedrock, Google Vertex, Anthropic, Custom LLM Gateways

items.feature: Programmatic platform access via API and SDK
Centralized control of editors and environment classes
SSO and OIDC identity and access controls
